source: Emitter oracle (Task P4): a FIXED-parameter (no fit) seeded ISimulatable<Matrix2D> draw off the RMC.BestFit BivariateDistribution (Normal copula, two fixed Normal marginals), dumped via tools/oracle_emitter and reproduced by tools/verify_oracles.py. The copula dependency parameter is pinned, isolating the seeded MersenneTwister stream through the copula GenerateRandomValues path; the n-row x 2-col matrix is flattened ROW-MAJOR (i = row*2 + col). The C++/R/Python port reproduces the C# draw bit-identically, so it carries rel 1e-9 (the fit-independent RNG bit-identity proof for the bivariate matrix draw path).
